details: The agent successfully visited all three required sites and produced correct answers: (1) Wikipedia - correctly identified Graydon Hoare as the designer with supporting context about Mozilla; (2) GitHub - correctly reported 112k stars (100k+); (3) rust-lang.org - correctly reported the exact tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.' All data was retrieved from actual page visits as evidenced by the detailed browser output in the trajectory.
